text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's already dark, but I can still hear noise coming
from the dance studio.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Aaaughhh! I just can't get these steps right.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: It looks so sharp and cool when Opera O does it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Judging from Vodka's movements, it looks like
she's only concentrating on her upper body.
choice_data_list: I think you're too focused on your upper body.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Ack!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: ...Oh, Trainer. Don't freak me out like that.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
What do you mean, I'm too focused on my upper
body?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Isn't dancing all about your facial expressions and
arm movements?
choice_data_list: You've gotta nail the foundation first.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Oh! That's right! It's just like how if you keep
topplin' your motorcycle, it means you needa
work on your footing!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Which means... if my lower half isn't sturdy, I can't
nail the routine.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Hey! You got any good lower body exercises for
me?
choice_data_list: How about using a stationary bike?
Long-distance running is probably the best way.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
A stationary bike? Oh, you mean those bikes at
the gym?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
How's that any different from ridin' a regular
bike? Are they really gonna help?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka doesn't seem keen on the idea, but the
next morning...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I hear a voice coming from the gym.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Vrrrroom vroooom!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Here we go! I'll show ya the thrill of my
full-throttle cornering technique!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Heheh, think ya can keep up with that kind of
half-assed effort?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Augh! Wh-what're you doing here?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Ju-just sayin', but you're the one who told me ride the stationary bike! Got it?
choice_data_list: Maybe, but the "vroom" noises were all you...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Scuse me?! Ya sure you're not just hearin' things?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
You know what? If you're just gonna get in the
way of my training, get outta here!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
...Geez! Can't even let my guard down for a
second. Now where was I?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Now, back to drifting the cliffside!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
...Hey! What're you lookin' at?! I-I thought I told
ya to get out!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm burning to know how Vodka's gonna hug
hairpin turns on a stationary bike, but she kicks
me out of the high-octane session.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: A long-distance run, huh? Hmmm...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Runnin' slow like that's not gonna give me results.
I'm gonna do things my way.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next morning, I see Vodka running on the
track.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... huff!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka's movements seem more sluggish than
usual.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Phew... What? What's with that face?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Oh, you think I'm moving weird?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Heheh. Hold on just a sec.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clang!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Some rather heavy-looking weights fall from
Vodka's ankles.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Heheh. I saw this martial artist advertising these
online. I thought they looked cool, so I got some
of my own.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
They're pretty heavy, but you can't see 'em under
my tracksuit at all, right?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: So I'm gonna try wearin' these all day today.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's possible they're good for her training, but
Vodka's movements remain awkward and robotic
all day long.
